ciphers.text: rendered in halftone B&W — the only portrait in the deck without color
ciphers.encoding_hint: Elicia is the OBSERVER. Color is the actor's medium; she records in monochrome. Her glitch frames are the only place color enters (faint chromatic aberration on rgb_shift) — when corruption hits, even the observer leaks.
her hand is always in the act of recording. Specifically the PERSONAL TAROT SYMBOLOGY NOTES journal — her interpretations of the same arcana the player is navigating.

ciphers.text: glitch frames briefly introduce color — burgundy + emerald (matches Empress dual-POV palette)
ciphers.encoding_hint: when Elicia corrupts, she TEMPORARILY adopts the Empress palette. Suggests Elicia is the ground truth and Nicola+Aria are her observations made into characters.
